🌕 පොසොන් පෝය සුභ වේවා! 🌕

POSON POYA
BLESSINGS

🌕

🙏 What is Poson Poya?

☸️

Buddhism Arrives

Poson celebrates the introduction of Buddhism to Sri Lanka by Arahat Mahinda Thero, son of Emperor Asoka, in the 3rd century BC.

⛰️

Sacred Mihintale

The historic meeting between Arahat Mahinda and King Devanampiyatissa took place at Mihintale, now a sacred pilgrimage site.

🏮

Festival of Lanterns

Thousands of colorful lanterns are lit across Sri Lanka, symbolizing the light of Dhamma illuminating the world.

🌿

Sil & Dansala

Devotees observe Atasil, and generous Dansalas (free food stalls) line the streets to celebrate compassion and generosity.

🏮 Lantern Matching Game

Match the identical pairs of Poson lanterns before time runs out!

Score 0
Moves 0
Time 60

🌕 Create Your Poson Greeting Card

Type your name, and it will appear on a personalized Poson card you can save and share!

👆 Fill in your name and click Generate Card

🌕

සෑම දෙනාටම පොසොන් පෝය සුභ වේවා!

May the blessings of Dhamma guide you always.
